instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders a sidebar navigation list from `navItems` (maps with `label` and `url`). Mark the item whose `url` equals `currentPath` with class `active`. Escape labels and URLs.
code:
<#-- Model: navItems: [{ label, url }], currentPath: string -->
    <#list navItems![] as item> <#assign isActive = (item.url!"") == (currentPath!"")> class="active"> ${item.label?html}
